options.label: Factory Stock
options.description: Unpainted shuttle delivery finish—cold white ceramics, graphite sealant, faint assembly-handling scuffs.

options.label: Neon Comet
options.description: Hot magenta, electric cyan, and deep graphite.

options.label: Europa Velvet
options.description: Teal depth, frosted ice, and a whisper of royal violet.

options.label: Solar Vice
options.description: Sunrise gold bleeding into chrome and blood orange.

options.label: Void Chrome
options.description: Near-black metal with a single violet edge light.

options.label: Cinderline Gold
options.description: Brushed brass over ash with ember undertones.

options.label: Saturn Club
options.description: Champagne panels, ring-dust silver, deep space ink.

options.label: Factory Stock
options.description: Stock lander aeroshell—muted bone epoxy, soot near the APS ports, boring in the best way.

options.label: Dust Angel
options.description: Soft bone white with rose dust weathering.

options.label: Frostbite Safety
options.description: High-vis arctic cyan and safety yellow trim.

options.label: Mariner Red
options.description: Heritage crimson with graphite panel breaks.

options.label: Hazard Bloom
options.description: Striped hazard tape energy with acid green bloom.

options.label: Factory Plum
options.description: Regulatory tame—pale plasma wash with grey falloff straight from OEM acceptance burns.

options.label: Plasma Kiss
options.description: Magenta-white core with electric violet falloff.

options.label: Blue Shift
options.description: Cool ion blue skewed hard toward UV.

options.label: Ember Wake
options.description: Smoldering orange coals trailing into smoke.

options.label: RCS Default
options.description: Documented cold-gas puff—dusty ivory core, slight oxide fringe, paperwork approved.

options.label: Cyan RCS
options.description: Crisp station-ops cyan puffs for tight burns.

options.label: Magenta RCS
options.description: Fantasia’s signature hot pink micro-thrust haze.

options.label: Amber RCS
options.description: Warm descent amber that reads clean in dust.

options.label: Fleet Issue
options.description: Unbadged multitool tinsel—the grey chassis every bay forgets exists until diagnostics scream.

options.label: Arcade Relic
options.description: Bezel purple, CRT green glass, worn plastic cream.

options.label: Surgical Pink
options.description: Clinic sterile white with shock pink grip panels.

options.label: Graphite Bloom
options.description: Matte graphite with thin oil-slick highlights.

options.label: Hull Title Registry
options.description: Register a custom shuttle title on your transponder (24 characters max).

options.label: No Pennant
options.description: Clear the decal package—bare airframe etiquette for shuttle and lander.
